mapper.select: SELECT currency_code, sum( `user_num` ) AS user_num, sum( `register_user_num` ) AS register_user_num, sum( `first_deposit_num` ) AS first_deposit_num, sum( `bet_user_count` ) AS bet_user_count, sum( `bet_amount` ) AS bet_amount, sum( `valid_amount` ) AS valid_amount, sum( `rebate_amount` ) AS rebate_amount, sum( `win_loss_amount_user` ) AS win_loss_amount_user, sum( `win_loss_amount_plat` ) AS win_loss_amount_plat, sum( `adjust_amount` ) AS adjust_amount, sum( `activity_amount` ) AS activity_amount, sum( `vip_amount` ) AS vip_amount, sum( `already_use_amount` ) AS already_use_amount, sum( `deposit_amount` ) AS deposit_amount, sum( `withdraw_amount` ) AS withdraw_amount, sum( `deposit_withdraw_fee_amount` ) AS deposit_withdraw_fee_amount from ( select * FROM report_top_agent_static_day ${ew.customSqlSegment} ) as t group by currency_code

SELECT agent_id, agent_account, currency_code, register_time, sum( `team_agent_num` ) AS team_agent_num, sum( `direct_report_num` ) AS direct_report_num, sum( `user_num` ) AS user_num, sum( `register_user_num` ) AS register_user_num, sum( `first_deposit_num` ) AS first_deposit_num, sum( `bet_user_count` ) AS bet_user_count, sum( `bet_amount` ) AS bet_amount, sum( `valid_amount` ) AS valid_amount, sum( `rebate_amount` ) AS rebateAmount, sum( `win_loss_amount_user` ) AS win_loss_amount_user, sum( `win_loss_amount_plat` ) AS win_loss_amount_plat, sum( `adjust_amount` ) AS adjust_amount, sum( `activity_amount` ) AS activity_amount, sum( `vip_amount` ) AS vip_amount, sum( `already_use_amount` ) AS already_use_amount, sum( `deposit_amount` ) AS deposit_amount, sum( `withdraw_amount` ) AS withdraw_amount, sum( `deposit_withdraw_fee_amount` ) AS deposit_withdraw_fee_amount from ( select * FROM report_top_agent_static_day ${ew.customSqlSegment} ) as t group by agent_id,agent_account,currency_code,register_time order by register_time desc

SELECT agent_id, agent_account, sum( `team_agent_num` ) AS team_agent_num, sum( `direct_report_num` ) AS direct_report_num from ( select agent_id,agent_account,report_date, max( `team_agent_num` ) AS team_agent_num, max( `direct_report_num` ) AS direct_report_num FROM ( select * from report_top_agent_static_day ${ew.customSqlSegment} ) as w group by agent_id,agent_account,report_date ) as t group by agent_id,agent_account

SELECT sum( `team_agent_num` ) AS team_agent_num, sum( `direct_report_num` ) AS direct_report_num from ( select agent_id,agent_account,report_date, max( `team_agent_num` ) AS team_agent_num, max( `direct_report_num` ) AS direct_report_num FROM ( select * from report_top_agent_static_day ${ew.customSqlSegment} ) as w group by agent_id,agent_account,report_date ) as t
